instruction: Someone reversed the black underline on this underline icon. Restore the original direction.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/underline.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.995 3.744v7.5a6 6 0 1 1-12 0v-7.5m-2.25 16.502h16.5"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="112" y1="116" x2="16" y2="116" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/underline.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.995 3.744v7.5a6 6 0 1 1-12 0v-7.5m-2.25 16.502h16.5"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="116" x2="112" y2="116" />
</svg>
